lane.title: 02 Google Ads
lane.last_task: Google Ads 2km radius and Hamza Hotel keyword intent audit
lane.last_summary: Read-only keyword-volume audit found Hamza Hotel brand demand is meaningful in Bangalore: hamza hotel avg 6600 monthly searches, Apr 2026 bucket 5400; hamza hotel shivaji nagar avg 590, Apr 880; hamza express avg 110, Apr 590. High-intent food terms include biryani near me open now avg 1900/Apr 1900, kabab near me avg 1300/Apr 1600, late night food near me avg 320/Apr 480, midnight food near me avg 320/Apr 390, non veg restaurant near me open now avg 320/Apr 390. No mutations made.
lane.next_action: Use 2km radius for easy-conversion search campaigns; split Hamza Hotel brand capture from late-night non-brand; add lodging/OYO/international negatives before any budget shift.

recent_events.task: Audit Late Night campaign 96-click leak before budget move
recent_events.summary: Read-only deep audit of Late Night campaign 23854158442 before any budget mutation. Live all-period stats: 1,678 impressions, 96 clicks, ₹3,168.82 spend, avg CPC ₹33.01, 0 Google conversions. Click concentration: Open Now Near Me ad group took 81/96 clicks and ₹2,764.50 spend; Biryani/Kabab took 10 clicks/₹292.26; Late Night Bangalore took 4 clicks/₹87.53; Non Veg Halal took 1 click/₹24.54. Top keyword was exact 'restaurants near me open now' with 35 clicks/₹1,178.96 and Quality Score 1/below-average landing + predicted CTR. Top reported search term was 'restaurants nearby' with 21 clicks/₹694.71; reported search terms explain only 39/96 clicks, so Google withholds many query details. Landing proof: /go/google-night is a 200 HTML landing page with buttons, not a direct Maps redirect. /api/google-ads-landing-event shows 66 pageviews, 15 maps clicks, 3 calls, 1 WhatsApp, 1 menu over 30d; therefore only about 15.6% of Google clicks became Maps taps and only 1% became WhatsApp. Root issue: broad generic near-me restaurant demand + non-direct landing funnel, not enough high-intent Maps/dish conversion.
recent_events.next_action: Do not move all budget blindly. Recommended correction before/with budget move: tighten Late Night toward dish/open-now intent, reduce generic near-me spend or force direct directions landing, and add measurement for gclid/source on directions; then reallocate Dinner/Brand budget only after rollback-safe budget readback.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only audit only; no budget or keyword mutation

recent_events.task: Extract live campaign age and campaign stats
recent_events.summary: Read-only live extraction from hamzaexpress.in Google cockpit period=all as of 2026-05-25. Stack totals since 2026-04-14: 10,170 impressions, 954 clicks, ₹4,161.11 spend, 0 conversions. Current enabled/serving Search campaigns: Late Night 23854158442 ₹300/day has 1,678 impressions, 96 clicks, ₹3,168.83 spend, active metric dates 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-25; Dinner 23855561197 ₹150/day has 24 impressions, 0 clicks, ₹0 spend, metric dates 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-24; Brand 23845870050 ₹50/day has 0 impressions/clicks/spend. PMax 23834053403 is paused, last metric date 2026-05-15, totals 8,468 impressions, 858 clicks, ₹992.28 spend, 0 conversions. If counting from latest Search activation/first metric on 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-25, elapsed is 10 days / 11 reporting dates inclusive; if asking days since active delivery, Late Night is active today = 0 days.
recent_events.next_action: Decide whether to fix non-delivery for Dinner/Brand or tune Late Night negatives/bids before any money mutation.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only stats extraction; no Ads mutation

recent_events.task: Verify Google Ads live account and delivery state
recent_events.summary: Read lane memory/control graph and live HE Google Ads APIs. Verified account customer 368-171-0084 via hamzaexpress.in API; active Search campaigns are Late Night 23854158442 ₹300/day, Dinner 23855561197 ₹150/day, Brand 23845870050 ₹50/day, all ENABLED/SERVING; PMax 23834053403 remains PAUSED at ₹300/day. 7d cockpit shows ₹2301.14 spend and 70 clicks, almost entirely Late Night; Dinner/Brand enabled but not materially delivering. Campaign criteria show HE pin proximity only: Late Night 7km, Dinner 3km, Brand 5km, PMax 2km; no city LOCATION criteria. Directions proof endpoint live with today's page_view/maps_auto_open events, currently from Meta UTMs rather than Google gclid. No ad mutation performed.
recent_events.next_action: Before any mutation, verify the specific target campaign/ad group/keyword IDs and decide whether to tune Late Night negatives/bids, fix Dinner/Brand delivery, or resume PMax; preserve rollback plan and current budgets.
recent_events.mutation_status: blocked until explicit live mutation approval; read-only verification only
